title: What a godly man does instead of chasing a wife
caption:
The desire is real. God put it there. You're not less spiritual because you feel the ache.

But the man who leads with his need — who walks into every room auditing the women in it — reeks of it. And she reads it in the first five minutes.

The truth no one says out loud: the guy chasing God first becomes the man worth marrying. Not as a trick. Not as a strategy. Because a man who's genuinely built — who's disciplined, planted, running toward something — is carrying himself differently. And she can feel the difference.

The want isn't the problem. What you do with it is.

Save this if you're in the season.

#faith #christianmen #godlymen #manofgod #discipline #christianity #purity #singleness #marriageprep
theme: He chases God, not a wife.
